title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 138.250 - Location of office
text:
138.250.  Location of office. — The state tax commission and the members thereof shall be furnished with appropriate quarters in Jefferson City, together with suitable equipment, furniture and supplies.
(RSMo 1939 § 11019, A.L. 1945 p. 1805 § 6) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9830; 1919 § 12839
